data.summary: Insufficient evidence to confirm the requirement for the 24h reminder functionality.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a 24-hour reminder SMS. However, the evidence does not provide concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate the implementation of this functionality. While the use case outlines the expected message, there is no confirmation that the system can generate or send this reminder, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of time-based trigger (24h before) implementation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
